name: Heraldic Beast Unicorn
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>紋</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>章</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ユニコーン
desc: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Psychic Xyz Monster in your GY; Special Summon it, but negate its effects. You can only use this effect of "Heraldic Beast Unicorn" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Psychic Xyz Monster in your GY; Special Summon it, but negate its effects. You can only use this effect of "Heraldic Beast Unicorn" once per turn.
eff: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Psychic Xyz Monster in your GY; Special Summon it, but negate its effects. You can only use this effect of "Heraldic Beast Unicorn" once per turn.

mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
